Hands demonstrating instrument tie technique with needle drivers on synthetic skin pad

frame_analyses.description: Final frame showing stapler demonstration on synthetic skin

confidence_rationale: Clear educational content with menu overlay showing different suturing techniques. VATA branding and structured presentation confirm this is instructional material, not a performance to be scored.
technique_summary: Educational demonstration of various suturing techniques including instrument tie, simple suture, buried suture, mattress sutures, figure-of-8, running sutures, and stapling techniques.
